index.title: Resource Translator
index.description: Resource Translator opens machine-translated pull requests for your resource files in any repo, in any format — powered by Azure AI Translator.
index.socialTitle: Resource Translator — translate resource files automatically
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.headlineAccent: Boitlamo bjo bongwe le bjo bongwe.
index.lede: Resource Translator opens machine-translated pull requests for your resource files using Azure AI Translator via the official SDK — no extra services, just a workflow.
index.workflowTitle: Phetolelo bjalo ka mošomo wa mošomo, e sego modumo.
index.workflowBody: Drop the action into your existing CI, point it at Azure AI Translator, and let your repo speak every language you target.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Drop a {configPath} file for include globs, glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

glossary.title: Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Tswalela maina a ditšweletšwa le mantšu a setšweletšwa ka regex ye bohlale ya mellwane ya mantšu yeo e šomago ka {cpp}, {dotnet} le bagwera.

dryRun.title: Go Go Gadget + Soft-Fail
dryRun.body: Preview translations without writing files, or surface every error as a warning while you iterate.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: Built on {azureSdk} + {corePipeline} — automatic retries on {statusCodes}, no hand-rolled HTTP. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-clean.

workflowPreview.body: Three secrets, four lines, and your repo is multilingual on the next push.

cta.title: Ready to localize on autopilot?
cta.body: One Azure AI Translator key, one workflow file. Mofetoledi wa Resource o šoma ka dilo tše dingwe.

getting-started.title: Go thoma
getting-started.lede: Add a workflow file, point it at your Azure AI Translator credentials, and the action will scan the repo for source-language resource files and emit translated siblings.

provision.title: Provision an Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Create an Azure AI Translator resource in the Azure portal, then store the following as GitHub repository secrets so the workflow can read them:

resource.title: Commit a source resource file
resource.body: Ditaodišosengwalo tša Sepedi di diriša thulaganyo ya {namingConvention} Go fa mohlala, {sourceFile} ba {frFile}, {deFile}, bjalobjalo.

output.title: Hlahloba setšweletšwa
output.body: Ge mošomo o fedile, tiro e utolla ditšweletšwa tše tharo tšeo o ka di kgokaganyago ka tlhalošo ya PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails} le {hasNewTranslations}. Gape e ngwala kakaretšo ya Markdown mo letlakaleng la mošomo ka {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Dikgato tše di latelago
nextSteps.recipes: See recipes for monorepos, custom glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

configuration.title: Sebopego
configuration.lede: Express defaults once in the repository config file and let every workflow inherit them. Action inputs always win when both are given.
configuration.intro: Kgonthiša gore o na le {configPath} ya go tsenya ge e le gore o hloka lefelo leo le sa fetogego.

fields.sourceLocale: E tla boela morago go {sourceLocale} ge e le gore ga se ya beakanywa. Also forwarded to Translator as {fromLocale} so short strings are not autodetected.
fields.toLocales: goba bja boitlamo goba go tšweletša mangwalo;
fields.includeExclude: Glob patterns tested against absolute and workspace-relative paths.
fields.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — your industry/domain knob (legal, medical, marketing tone, etc.). Sent ya {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Refilwe {plain}. Use {html} only if your resource values contain real HTML fragments.
fields.profanityAction: Ka moo o ka šomišago ditaodišosengwalo tša Sepedi ka go fetolela?
fields.profanityMarker: E na le mohola fela ge {profanityAction} {marked}.
fields.allowFallback: Set to {false} to fail the translation when your {categoryId} has no deployment for a target locale instead of falling back to the general model.
fields.maxRetries: Maximum retry attempts on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}). Refilwe {defaultRetries}. Palomoka ya megala ya HTTP ka kgopelo ke {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Lebo Sekgobela - Lebo Sekgobela - Lebo Sekgobela Refilwe {defaultBackoff}. Hlogo ya {retryAfter} ya Azure e hlomphiwa gabotse ge e le gona; otherwise jittered exponential backoff is used, capped at this value.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Refilwe {true}. When on, tokens like {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} and HTML entities are replaced with sentinel tokens before translation and restored later. Disable only when source intentionally contains placeholder-shaped literals.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Extra regex patterns (without delimiters) added to the default placeholder set, e.g. {angleToken} for custom token syntax. Melao ye e sego ya maleba e a hlokomologwa.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Glob patterns matched against parser-level keys (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). Dinotlelo tša go swana di tlošwa go tšwa go kgopelo gomme di fetišetšwa ka boleng bja tšona bja mothopo bo bolokilwe.

steps.actionInputs: Mongwadi o bala ditaodišosengwalo tša Sepedi go tšwa go Kgoro ya Merero ya Selegae.
steps.config: It loads the YAML config from {configPath}.
steps.precedence: Mo tšhemong ye nngwe le ye nngwe ye e abelanwago, input e a fenya; go sego bjalo, boleng bja YAML bo a šomišwa.
steps.validation: Ditekanyetšo tše di kopantšwego di a tiišetšwa. Mantšu ao a sa amogelegego (mohlala, {invalidEnum}) a dira gore molaetša o se ke wa palelwa ka pela ka molaetša wo o kwagalago.

tone.heading: Tone & Industry in plain terms
tone.body: Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Mp3 Ditefelo tše pedi di kopanya go go fa bontši bja taolo e swanago:
tone.industryBody: diriša {categoryId} go šupa sehlopha sa Azure {customTranslatorLink} seo se hlahlilwego ka corpus ya gago — ya molao, ya sethekniki, ya kalafo, ya papatšo, goba se sengwe le se sengwe. Ye ke segalo se segolo sa segalo, segalo le tlotlontšu.
tone.surfaceBody: Use the {glossaryLink} to lock brand names and product terms verbatim, and use {profanityAction} to scrub profane terms when targeting localization for young audiences.

inputs.title: Inputs & outputs
inputs.lede: Every input is also accepted in the optional repo config file. Ge bobedi bja tšona di phethilwe, go na le dithulaganyo tše pedi tšeo di tšweleditšwego.
inputs.configurationIntro: See {configurationLink} for the YAML schema and loading order.

items.sourceLocale: Lefelo la lefelo (mohlala, {en}) leo le šomišwago go hwetša difaele tša methopo tša go swana le {sourceGlob}. Gape o ile a romelwa go mofetoledi bjalo ka mofetoledi yo {fromLocale}.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Go Pass {secrets}.
items.endpoint: URL ya mafelelo ya mofetoledi, mohlala, {endpointUrl}.

items.region: Translator resource region (omit for global resources).
items.toLocales: Go Tradução Go E amogela dinomoro tša JSON array ({jsonArray}) goba dikholego tše di arogantšwego ke koma.
items.include: Newline-separated glob patterns; Ke fela ditokomane tšeo di fetoletšwego go ya ka diphetolelo.
items.exclude: Newline-separated glob patterns; Ditokumente tša go fapafapana di a tlošwa (di dirilwe ka morago ga go akaretšwa).
items.configPath: Tsela ya go ya go YAML config file (mabapi le modu wa mošomo).
items.dryRun: Ge {true}, ngwala diphetolelo le go ngwala dingwalwa tše dintši eupša o se ke wa ngwala dingwalwa.
items.failOnError: Ge {true}, diphošo tšeo di sa letelwago di palelwa ke kgato; Ge {false}, diphošo di a lemošwa.

translatorInputs.heading: Translator request inputs
translatorInputs.intro: These map directly into Azure AI Translator v3 query parameters. Ye nngwe le ye nngwe ke ya boikgethelo; Mofetoledi o palelwa ke go fetolela ge a sa šome.
translatorInputs.caption: Translator request inputs

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — the industry/domain/tone knob. E tšweleditšwe bjalo ka {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} goba {html}. Use {html} only when your resource values are real HTML fragments.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked} goba {deleted}. Lemoga ka moo diphetolelo di tšwelelago ka gona mo diphetolelong.
items.profanityMarker: {asterisk} goba {tag}. E na le mohola fela ge {profanityAction} {marked}.
items.allowFallback: Ge {false}, mofetoledi o bušetša phošo sebakeng sa go wela morago go tshepedišo ya kakaretšo ge {categoryId} ya gago e se na kabo ya lefelo leo le lebeletšwego.

resilienceInputs.heading: Kgotlelelo le tšhireletšo ya placeholder
resilienceInputs.intro: These inputs control how the action behaves when Translator throttles your request and how it shields placeholder tokens like {mustache} or {indexZero} from being mangled during translation.
resilienceInputs.caption: Resilience and placeholder protection inputs

items.maxRetries: Maximum retry attempts on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}). Palomoka ya dikgopelo tša GEMS ka kgopelo ke {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Cap (in milliseconds) on any single backoff sleep. Tiro e hlompha Azure's {retryAfter} response header exactly when present; otherwise it uses jittered exponential backoff capped at this value.
items.protectPlaceholders: When {true} (default), placeholders such as {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} and HTML entities are replaced with sentinel tokens before translation and restored later. Disable only when your source intentionally contains literal placeholder-shaped text that should be translated.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Newline-separated regexes (without delimiters) added to the default placeholder set, e.g. {angleToken} for custom token syntax.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Newline-separated glob patterns matched against parser-level keys (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). Dinotlelo tša go sepelelana di tlošwa go tšwa go kgopelo ya Mofetoledi gomme di fetišetšwa ka boleng bja tšona bja mothopo bo bolokilwe.

items.summaryDetails: Markdown summary suitable for a PR body or job summary.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} ge e le gore phetolelo e tee goba tše pedi tše mpsha di tšweleditšwe.

formats.title: Difomete tša faele
formats.heroTitle: Difomete tša faele tše di thekgwago
formats.lede: Difomete tše tshela tša methopo ya go dikologa. The action reads each source-locale file, translates the values, and writes a sibling per target locale.
formats.namingConvention: Direkoto ka moka di diriša leina la {namingConvention} le lengwe.

resx.blurb: XML-based .NET resource files. Fetolela sengwalwa sa ka gare sa node ye nngwe le ye nngwe ya {dataValue}, go boloka ditshwaotshwao le metadata.

xliff.blurb: OASIS XLIFF 2.0 documents. Fetolela {source} ye nngwe le ye nngwe gomme o ngwale dipoelo go {target} ya go sepelelana le yona, o bee {trgLang} ya lefelo.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object files. Fetolela sebopego se sengwe le se sengwe sa {msgid} / {msgidPlural} go dibopego tša {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural}

json.blurb: Difaele tša JSON tše di sa tlwaelegago. Nested objects are flattened with the {delimiter} delimiter for translation, then re-nested on output. Dinotlelo tša maswaodikga ({dottedKey}) di bolokilwe ka mantšu.

ini.blurb: Difaele tša {keyValue} tše bonolo (Win32-style INI or any flat config). Dihlogo tša dihlogo le ditshwaotshwao di bolokilwe.
ini.specLabel: Sebopego sa faele sa INI go Wikipedia

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI text resources — flat {keyValue} pairs used as a textual companion to {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Ditiišetšo tša leeto la go ya go ile
roundTrip.body: The test suite verifies byte-for-byte round-tripping for representative fixtures of every format. If a format quirk breaks round-tripping in your codebase, please {issueLink} with a minimal sample.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.lede: Common patterns for shipping translations: monorepos, glossaries, custom categories, dry runs, and tone control.

pullRequest.heading: Bula foromo ya kgopelo ka morago ga go ngwala ka morago ga go ngwala

glossary.heading: Glossary for brand names and product terms
glossary.body: Glossary terms are applied {after} translation, so the machine-translated output keeps your favourite branding even when the model swapped it for a synonym.

customCategory.heading: Custom Translator category (industry / domain)
customCategory.body: Hlahla sehlopha sa Azure {customTranslatorLink} ka corpus yeo e swarago polelo le segalo sa intasteri ya gago (tša molao, tša kalafo, tša papatšo, tša ka gare, bj.bj.) gomme o fetiše ID ya yona ka {categoryId}. This is the strongest tone lever Azure offers.

tone.heading: Tone control + strict fallback
tone.body: Kopanya Custom Translator {categoryId} le {profanityAction} le {allowFallbackFalse} go gapeletša lentšu le le sa fetogego le go palelwa ke tshepedišo ya mošomo ge e le gore sehlopha seo se kgethilwego ga se na kabo ya ye nngwe ya mafelo ao o a lebeletšego.

dryRun.heading: Thoma go šoma pele ga ge o thoma go šoma
dryRun.body: Kgato e sa ntše e ntšha dipoelo tša kakaretšo le kakaretšo ya kgato, eupša ga go na difaele tše di ngwadilwego. Kopanya le {failOnErrorFalse} go tšweletša taba ye nngwe le ye nngwe bjalo ka temošo ge o boeletša.

faq.title: Dipotšišo tša go botšišwa gantši
faq.lede: Araba dipotšišo tše di botšišwago gantšintši ge o thoma go dira bjalo.

azure.heading: How does the action talk to Azure?
azure.body: Ka go diriša {azureSdkLink} SDK ya semmušo ya Microsoft, e beakantšwe ka {corePipelineLink}. That gets you automatic retries on {statusCodes}, typed request and response models, and authentication header handling for free — everything that used to be a hand-rolled {axios} call. Dipoelo tša ditšweletšwa (ditšweletšwa, ditšweletšwa, ditšweletšwa tša difaele) ga di fetoge.

tone.heading: Ke ka lebaka la eng ka dinako tše dingwe diphetolelo di sa fetoge?
tone.body: Phetolelo ya motšhene e palelwa ke go fetolela ka kakaretšo. Three knobs help: a {glossaryLink} for hard term overrides, a {customTranslatorLink} for fine-tuned models trained on your tone and vocabulary, and {profanityAction} to scrub or flag profane terms.

duplicateFiles.heading: Nka efoga bjang go fetolela faele e tee gabedi?
duplicateFiles.body: Hlohleletša tshepedišo ya mošomo go {paths} tšeo di sepelelanago le difaele tša gago tša mothopo-locale fela, mohlala, {sourceGlob}. Tiro gape e akaretša filtara ya yona ya faele ya per-trigger ge {githubToken} e beilwe, go fokotša mošomo go difaele tša commit ya moragorago.

offline.heading: Na nka dira tiro ya ka ntle ga inthanete?
offline.body: Not exactly — Azure AI Translator is the runtime brain. Eupša o ka šoma le {dryRunTrue} go kgonthišiša parsing le config ntle le go dira dikgopelo tša HTTP tša phetolelo.

node.heading: What Node version does the action run on?
node.body: v3 Go Go Gadget Actions {nodeRuntime} Runtime JavaScript e sepelelana le Node 20, 22 le 24, e lego seo CI e se lekago.

dist.heading: O tšwa kae {distDir} tše di tletšego?
dist.body: GitHub JS actions ship their compiled JS in the repository. The {distBuild} workflow rebuilds it after every merge to {mainBranch} if it would drift, and {distCheck} blocks PRs that would land out-of-date output.

formats.heading: Go thwe'ng ka difomete tše dingwe tša methopo?
formats.body: Lehono: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} if you need another — the parser interface is small (parse → map → apply translations → format) and contributions are welcome.

translations.title: Diphetolelo
translations.lede: This page is translated by Resource Translator itself, on every push to main, into every language Azure AI Translators supports.
translations.statusComplete: {translatedCount} ga bjale e fetoletšwe — e feletše!
translations.statusPending: {translatedCount} currently rendered — {pendingCount} pending the next {workflowName} run.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Ngwala ka polelo, leina la setšo goba leina la setšo.

howItWorks.heading: Ka moo se se šomago ka gona

steps.workflow: Pushes that touch it kick off {workflowLink}, which runs {thisAction} against itself.
steps.fanOut: Tiragalo ye e sepelelana le lefelo le lengwe le le lengwe leo le thekgwago ke mofetoledi wa Azure AI (le rulagantšwe ka {configPath}) gomme le ngwala {messagesLocaleJson} ya ngwanabo rena ka nepo.
steps.pullRequest: Diphetolelo tše mpsha di a hwetšagala ka go diriša diphetolelo tše mpsha. Go e kopanya go gatiša gape letlakala le ka dikarata tše di tladitšwego.

translations.poweredBy: Powered by Resource Translator and Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Go tsenya letsogo
contributing.lede: Dipego tša diphošo, dikgopelo tša dikarolwana le dikgopelo tša go goga ka moka di a amogelwa. Tiragalo ye ke ye nnyane go lekana go ba le segwera go bao ba kgathago tema la mathomo.

steps.extension: Add the file extension to {translationFileSchemes} in {finderFile}.
steps.tests: Ngwala diteko tša go ya go ile-→ ka sebopego sa

coverage.heading: Coverage thresholds
coverage.body: Tshepedišo ya JEST e gapeletša tšhireletšo ya bonnyane bja tšhireletšo. New code must keep the statements + lines threshold above 78% and functions above 90%. Add fixtures and tests along your change.

docsSite.heading: Documentation site
docsSite.body: The {docsDir} folder is an Astro 6 + Tailwind v4 project. Run {npmInstall} there once, then {npmRunDev} for local preview. The {pagesWorkflow} workflow ships docs to GitHub Pages on every merge.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.lede: Kakaretšo ya ditaodišosengwalo tša Sepedi. The canonical, authoritative changelog lives in CHANGELOG.md in the repository.
changelog.fullRecord: Lebelela {changelogLink} go hwetša rekoto ka botlalo.

items.newInputs: Ditsenyo tše mpsha: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, gammogo le dikonopo tša Phetolelo tše di tšwetšego pele {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker} le {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Source locale is now also forwarded to Translator as {fromLocale} so short strings are not autodetected.
items.resilience: {label} automatic retry on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}) honoring Azure's {retryAfter} header — falls back to jittered exponential backoff when absent. Tunable via {maxRetries} and {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} tokens like {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} and HTML entities are wrapped in sentinels before translation and restored later, so Translator stops mangling i18next/Mustache/Handlebars/.NET/printf placeholders. Toggle via {protectPlaceholders}; Go Go Gadget {customPlaceholderPatterns} {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} new {noTranslatePatterns} input drops matching keys from the Translator request completely (preserves source values for brand names, error codes, etc.). Matches glob patterns against parser-level keys (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs site with view transitions and Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA pass. Logo glyphs converted to paths so they no longer fail color-contrast against gradient stops, the floating {backToTop} button uses {inert} while hidden (instead of an {ariaHidden} toggle that left it tabbable), {formatsAstro} sections no longer collide with their auto-generated heading IDs, three locale cards now expose BCP-47-valid {lang} attributes ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), duplicate {documentation} landmark labels are disambiguated between sidebar and footer,  gomme tafola ye nngwe le ye nngwe ya data go {inputs}/{configuration} e na le seswantšho sa sekirini.
items.inlineCode: {label} docs prose {codeElement} now wears the warm/amber theme accent — distinct from the brand→accent palette used for links and headings.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
